title: Surat Thani, Surat Thani — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Surat Thani is a city in Surat Thani with a population of 130,000. The gateway to the Gulf of Thailand islands, this provincial capital offers a very low cost of living and easy access to Koh Samui, Koh Phangan, and Koh Tao.
